summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Two open security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling, two already-closed PRs are recorded as skipped keep-closed, one open cron PR is superseded by hydrated PR #90194, and the remaining open PRs are kept non-mutating for ordinary maintainer review or follow-up.

actions.reason: Unique docs cleanup PR in an inventory shard; not a duplicate or low-signal closeout target.
Open security-boundary PR must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling, with no ProjectClownfish close, merge, label, comment, or fix action.
Related to hydrated issue #75938, but not closable in this inventory shard because it is an active feature PR with unique implementation work and failing proof.
Workflow/automation changes with a security-boundary label and failing security/proof gates belong in central security handling, not ProjectClownfish cleanup.
Already closed in live preflight state.
Unique active feature PR with author follow-up and failing proof; no duplicate/superseded closeout basis in this inventory shard.
Open contributor PR is superseded by hydrated canonical PR #90194; planned close preserves contributor credit and names the replacement path.
Already closed in live preflight state.
Already closed security-sensitive PR; record as skipped keep-closed rather than routing a new mutation.
Unique narrow bugfix PR; merge is blocked by job frontmatter and missing merge preflight, but classification does not require human escalation.
